positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a majestic lion wearing a crown of woven tropical leaves and bright exotic flowers, sitting regally on a stylized floating jungle rock. The lion has a friendly, confident expression, rendered in a clean, high-contrast line art style mixed with vibrant, saturated flat colors. The background should be a dense, stylized tropical jungle scene, including large, simplified monstera leaves, orchid clusters, and flowing waterfall patterns, all arranged in a circular or contained composition suitable for an apparel print. Composition must be central and symmetrical. Use strong silhouettes, a bold graphic aesthetic, and a pop art color palette (deep turquoise, emerald green, sunset orange, gold accents). Vector art quality, highly detailed, crisp lines, flat graphic design, clean edges, digital painting, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, noisy, realistic, photorealistic, sketch, logo, text, watermark, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor details, grainy, low contrast, jpeg artifacts
